name: Italian Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together 1 pound of ground pork, 1 medium onion finely chopped, and 1 small garlic clove crushed.
2. Combine and mix into the pork mixture: 1/2 tablespoon salt, 1/2 teaspoon ground pepper, 1/2 teaspoon fennel seed, 1/4 teaspoon paprika, 1/8 teaspoon ground thyme, and 1/8 teaspoon (or more) cayenne pepper.
3. Shape the mixture into patties, meatballs, or stuff into casings.
